content.rendered: Join Prowler CEO Toni de la Fuente and Prowler Engineers Adrián Peña and Pepe Fagoaga for an in-depth introduction to the Prowler SDK-Core. In this 60-minute session, you’ll discover how to leverage the SDK-Core to build custom security workflows, integrate seamlessly into your existing development environment, and take full advantage of Prowler’s powerful detection and remediation features. Don’t miss this opportunity to elevate your cloud security expertise with practical insights and live demos!
